reason: Graphiti.add_episode() dedup queries timeout at scale (912 errors at 73% failure). O(n) fulltext search on RELATES_TO index becomes bottleneck. Direct FalkorDB writes eliminate dedup overhead.
outcome: 0 errors ingesting 1268 episodes in single run. 100% success rate.

decision: Restart karma-server with proper volume mounts and LEDGER_PATH
reason: consciousness.jsonl write failing: [Errno 2] No such file or directory '/ledger/memory.jsonl'. Container doesn't have volume mounted. Default path wrong.
outcome: Restarted with -v /opt/seed-vault/memory_v1/ledger:/ledger:rw and LEDGER_PATH=/ledger/memory.jsonl. Consciousness loop confirms running.

decision: Revert system prompt edits to backup (server.js.bak)
reason: SyntaxError: Invalid or unexpected token at line 365. Attempted to inject autonomy messaging but created literal newline in JS string.
outcome: Reverted to server.js.bak. Hub-bridge starts cleanly. System prompt reverted to baseline.

reason: Router logs showed 401 errors from both providers. Keys expired or invalid.
outcome: Both keys updated and restarted karma-server. Router now shows all 4 models registered.

decision: Test full stack end-to-end before building resurrection spine
reason: Verify foundation actually works before building persistence layer.
outcome: Hub-bridge /v1/chat responds ok:true. Tool-use infrastructure works. Consciousness loop confirmed running. Vault writes confirmed.

decision: Build resurrection spine files: identity.json, invariants.json, direction.md, checkpoint/
reason: Foundation verified. Spine provides persistent context across sessions.
outcome: Created all spine files and committed to git. Ready for extraction + resurrection scripts.
